title: Collaboration index feed lists participants with their op-feed topics and joinedAt
content:
# Collaboration Index Feed

When a document becomes collaborative, the sharer creates a collaboration index feed at `ph:v2:collab:<docId>`, owned by the sharer's signer.

## Schema

```json
{
  "docId": "doc-001",
  "documentType": "powerhouse/budget-statement",
  "name": "Q1 Budget",
  "createdBy": "0xAlice_signer",
  "collaborators": [
    {
      "address": "0xAlice_signer",
      "opFeedTopic": "ph:v2:ops:0xalice_signer:doc-001",
      "joinedAt": "2026-04-10T12:00:00Z"
    },
    {
      "address": "0xBob_signer",
      "opFeedTopic": "ph:v2:ops:0xbob_signer:doc-001",
      "joinedAt": "2026-04-10T14:00:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-10T14:00:00Z"
}
```

## Role

- Acts as a directory: given `docId`, anyone can discover all participant op-feed topics
- Only the creator can append — but collaborators can be added by updating the index
- Each collaborator still owns their own ops feed; the index is a lookup table, not a merge point
description: Collaboration index feed at ph:v2:collab:<docId> lists collaborators with their address, opFeedTopic, and joinedAt, enabling peers to locate each participant's ops feed.
